title: Antifragile
author: Nassim Taleb
note: the framework i quietly run every shipping decision through.

title: The Creative Act
author: Rick Rubin
note: less how-to, more how-to-be. re-reading every winter.

title: Thinking with Type
author: Ellen Lupton
note: the only typography book that doesn't feel academic.

title: Designing Design
author: Kenya Hara
note: muji's design director on emptiness as a tool.

title: The Box
author: Marc Levinson
note: containerization story — closest thing the supply-chain world has to a thriller.

title: Where Is My Flying Car?
author: J. Storrs Hall
note: uncomfortable read on why we stopped building.

title: Working in Public
author: Nadia Eghbal
note: open-source maintainers as the load-bearing wall under everything.

title: The Information
author: James Gleick
note: long arc from drums to bits. dense, worth it.

title: Gödel, Escher, Bach
author: Douglas Hofstadter
note: still rereading. probably will be forever.

title: Seeing Like a State
author: James C. Scott
note: why top-down legibility breaks the systems it tries to organize.
